overview: Netaji Subhas University of Technology (NSUT), formerly Netaji Subhas Institute of Technology (NSIT), is a premier autonomous state public university established in 1983 and located in Dwarka, New Delhi. Spread across a 145-acre campus, NSUT is recognized for its strong engineering education, advanced research ecosystem, technological innovation, and excellent placement performance under the governance of the Government of NCT of Delhi.
accreditation: Recognized by UGC; major engineering programs aligned with Tier-1 NBA accreditation standards.

admissions.admissionProcess: B.Tech admissions are conducted through JAC Delhi counseling based on JEE Main ranks. Postgraduate admissions follow national-level entrance examination criteria.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions follow the official JAC Delhi and university academic schedule.

campus.hostelFees: ₹1,10,000 – ₹1,32,000 per year depending on room type and AC/non-AC selection
campus.messFacilities: Vegetarian and non-vegetarian meal services operated through hostel mess committees.
campus.specialNote: NSUT is widely known for strong industry collaborations, startup incubation, and high placement packages in AI, CSE, and IT branches.

scholarships.ewsSupport: Delhi Government Higher Education Trust provides 25%–100% tuition fee waivers for eligible EWS students.
scholarships.nationalScholarships: Integrated with NSP scholarships for SC, ST, and minority students.
scholarships.gateStipend: ₹12,400 per month for eligible M.Tech students admitted through GATE.

contact.address: Netaji Subhas University of Technology (NSUT), Azad Hind Fauj Marg, Sector 3, Dwarka, New Delhi – 110078, India
